title: Munnar Alleppey Tour Package
subtitle: India | Travel | Holiday Dream  Explore  Discover...
duration: India | Travel | Holiday Dream  Explore  Discover
highlights: Discover the tranquil beauty of Kerala with a 4-day Munnar and Alleppey tour. Explore the hill stations of Munnar, famous for its lush tea plantations, and the serene backwaters of Alleppey with its iconic houseboats. This package offers a perfect blend of nature, adventure, and relaxation in two of Kerala's most captivating destinations.

itinerary.title: Day 3 -  Munnar to Alleppey - Houseboat Experience

inclusions: Accommodation in Hotel as per the variant selected
Breakfast and Dinner as mentioned in the variant
All toll tax, parking, fuel and driver allowances
Comfortable and hygienic vehicle (AC Sedan/SUV/Traveler) for sightseeing on all days as per the itinerary

faqs.question: What is the best time for Munnar?
faqs.answer: For pleasant weather, visit between March and June.

faqs.question: Are meals included?
faqs.answer: Breakfast and dinner are typically included in most packages.

faqs.question: Is it safe for solo travelers?
faqs.answer: Yes, our guides ensure a very safe environment for everyone.

reviews.name: Happy Guest 3
reviews.text: Rajasthan’s royal palaces, majestic forts, and rich cultural heritage await you. Journey through this enchanting land and experience India’s heritage like never before.

reviews.name: Happy Guest 2
reviews.text: Embark on a once-in-a-lifetime adventure to Spiti Valley. With its breathtaking landscapes and remote monasteries, Spiti offers an experience that will stay with you forever.

reviews.name: Happy Guest 4
reviews.text: Sunshine, beaches, backwaters, and serenity. Discover the beauty of Kerala and Goa with our tailored tours that bring you the best of India’s coastal paradise.
